title: VDBE program uses an expired value
poc: UPDATE t1 SET c=b WHERE a=1;
key_bug_features: Using a register initialized by SCopy from another register
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b TEXT, c REAL DEFAULT 0) WITHOUT ROWID;
INSERT INTO t1(a, b, c) VALUES(1, 'test', 3.14);
CREATE TRIGGER r1 BEFORE UPDATE ON t1 BEGIN INSERT INTO record(x, y) VALUES('update-trigger', new.b);
UPDATE t1 SET c = b WHERE a = 1;
CREATE TABLE record(x TEXT, y TEXT);
